err_id_read: Aqoonsiga lama akhrin karin — gali gacanta.
id_low_confidence: ⚠️ Hubaal yar — hubi inuu waafaqsan yahay.
id_captured: ✓ Aqoonsiga waa la qaaday — hubi inuu waafaqsan yahay.
err_id_failed: Sikaanka aqoonsiga wuu fashilmay — gali gacanta.
err_verify_receiver: Xaqiiji qofka qaadanaya — sikaan ama gali lambarka aqoonsigiisa.
err_photo_required: Sawir ka qaad xirmada marka la gudbinayo.
err_confirm_payment: Xirmadan waa {status} ({symbol}{amount}). Xaqiiji lacag-bixinta ka hor inta aan la sii dayn.
err_photo_upload_failed: Soo geynta sawirka way fashilantay — mar kale qaad.
err_network_retry: Khalad shabakadeed — isku day mar kale.
empty_state: Ma jiraan xirmooyin sugaya in laga qaado laantaada. Halkan way ka soo muuqan doonaan marka qofka wax qaata uu helo.
payment_received_full: Lacagta si buuxda ayaa loo helay
